title: Senior Teacher - Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates:
Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Udemy India Asia Pacific Associates!
